steps.title: Translate 120% greater into an equation for f
steps.content:
If $f$ is 120% greater than $g$, then $f$ equals $g$ plus 120% of $g$:
$$f = g + 1.20g = 2.20g$$

steps.title: Translate 90% less into an equation for h
steps.content:
If $h$ is 90% less than $f$, then $h$ is 10% of $f$ (since 100% − 90% = 10%):
$$h = 0.10f$$

steps.title: Substitute to express h in terms of g
steps.content:
Substitute $f = 2.20g$ into the equation for $h$:
$$h = 0.10(2.20g) = 0.22g$$

This means $h$ is 0.22 times $g$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
